docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $602.00 FILED BY DENNIS, EARL AS TO DEFENDANT FRIEDLING, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-24-2003 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
MOTION COURTS OWM MOTION TO VACATE JUDMT/CONT FILED BY DEFENDANT FRIEDLING, RICHARD HEARING SET FOR MAY-27-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION COURTS OWM MOTION TO VACATE JUDMT/CONT OF MAY-27-2003, GRANTED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FRIEDLING, RICHARD

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DENNIS, EARL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRIEDLING, RICHARD $602.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $654.00, ARBITRATION AWARD OF $602. CONFIRMED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF EARL DENNIS AGAINST DEFENDANT RICHARD FRIEDLING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE ARBITRATION AWARD IN FAVOR OF EARL DENNIS & AGAINST RICHARD FRIEDLING FOR $652. IS CONFIRMED IF NO APPEARANCES CASE WILL BE DISMISSED W/PREJ.
